# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.ShapeScatterRandomness property

How strongly the ray direction deviates from the center-to-surface direction.

`0` = rays point exactly away from the shape center

`50` = rays point in entirely random directions.

```csharp
public int ShapeScatterRandomness { get; set; }
```
